description: This pipeline applies an auto-thresholding algorithm to incoming data, grouping it based on annotations, and then refines the result by applying a median filter to each 2D slice or channel, producing a smoothed output.

5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

ceb9ac4e-0eba-4e32-acdc-179417756f0f.name: ij1-blur-median2d
ceb9ac4e-0eba-4e32-acdc-179417756f0f.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
